summary: Software Development Engineer with 1.5+ years of experience building end-to-end full-stack applications using React.js, TypeScript, Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and cloud-native technologies. Experienced in developing reusable UI components, responsive interfaces, REST APIs, distributed backend services, workflow automation, AI-assisted solutions, and scalable applications.

experience.company: JTR High Yields Agro Pvt Ltd
responsibilities: Developed reusable React components and responsive administrative interfaces supporting multiple business workflows.

Developed AI-powered invoice processing pipelines integrating OCR, OpenAI, vendor matching, transactional persistence, and rollback-safe artifact finalization.
Led end-to-end development of a ticketing and inventory management platform used by 20+ internal users, reducing issue resolution time by 40%.

Implemented LDAP authentication, role-based authorization, and secure enterprise login flows.
Built workflow automation modules reducing manual effort by approximately 60%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design APIs, optimize database queries, and deliver scalable full-stack features.
